artifacts.validation_gate: Skills/cnn_split_validator.py reported PASS on 2026-06-20.
artifacts.next_action: Retain; C13/C14/C15/C16 all rejected; LR tuning and BN+WD regularization both exhausted — next candidate needs materially different approach.

last_known.root_cause: LR=1e-3 too high for pretrained init; val_loss spiked epoch 5 (0.8421) while train_loss fell to 0.2247 — severe overfitting

artifacts.validation_gate: Rejected: AUC 0.8342 < 0.85, calibration worsened Brier (0.1664→0.1828) and ECE (0.0625→0.1334). Root cause: LR too high.
artifacts.next_action: Do not promote. C14 uses configs/cnn_tess_finetune_c12.json (LR=3e-5) on same combined splits.

last_known.root_cause: LR=3e-5 too conservative — ReduceLROnPlateau decayed LR to near-zero (1.17e-7 by epoch 79), locking model in local optimum below C13 ceiling; val AUC plateaued at 0.8115 from epoch 56
last_known.calibration_note: Raw ECE=0.0273 is excellent; Platt A=1.696 overcorrects (sharpens already-calibrated probs); 4th consecutive candidate where Platt worsens ECE

artifacts.validation_gate: Rejected: AUC 0.8319 < 0.85, cal F1 0.7860 < 0.80, Platt worsened Brier/ECE. Root cause: LR too conservative, converged below C13 ceiling.
artifacts.next_action: Do not promote. C15 uses LR=1e-4 (intermediate) + on-the-fly augmentation on same combined splits.

last_known.root_cause: LR tuning exhausted — C13 (1e-3), C14 (3e-5), C15 (1e-4) all plateau at test AUC 0.83-0.84. Overfitting is the bottleneck: model peaked at epoch 16 (train_loss=0.46) then val_loss climbed 34% (0.77→1.03) over 20 patience epochs while train_loss fell to 0.28. weight_decay=1e-3 and use_batch_norm=false insufficient to regularize at this scale.
last_known.calibration_note: Raw ECE=0.0427 is good; Platt A=1.74 sharpens already-calibrated probs — 5th consecutive calibration failure across C11-C15

artifacts.validation_gate: Rejected: AUC 0.8353 < 0.85, cal F1 0.7938 < 0.80, Platt worsened Brier/ECE. LR tuning exhausted; regularization change required for C16.
artifacts.next_action: Do not promote. C16 uses use_batch_norm=true and weight_decay=1e-2 on same combined splits.

last_known.pretrain_transfer_note: BatchNorm layers shift Sequential indices — only conv.0 and fc layers transferred; 2nd+3rd conv layers trained from random init
last_known.root_cause: BN index shift caused catastrophic partial transfer (only conv.0 + fc transferred). Random-init 2nd+3rd conv layers combined with weight_decay=1e-2 caused val_loss explosion (0.78→3.83 over 35 epochs). val AUC never exceeded 0.6650 (barely above random); evaluator not run.

artifacts.validation_gate: Rejected without evaluator run: best val AUC 0.6650 is far below the 0.85 gate. BN+strong WD approach definitively failed.
artifacts.next_action: Do not promote or rerun. C17 uses joint Kepler+TESS training to break the data-ceiling.

artifacts.validation_gate: Run Skills/cnn_split_validator.py data/joint_cnn_splits after build and confirm PASS before training C17.
artifacts.next_action: Retain for reproducibility; DO NOT use as training input for future candidates — C17 joint training caused domain mismatch (val AUC 0.7859, worse than TESS-only C13-C15)

artifacts.validation_gate: Run evaluate_cnn_checkpoint.py after training; PASS requires raw AUC >= 0.85, calibrated F1 >= 0.80, temperature scaling must not worsen Brier/ECE.
artifacts.next_action: Rejected; do not promote or rerun joint training. Root cause: Kepler 30-min cadence and TESS 2-min cadence morphologies differ; joint training caused val_loss explosion 0.79->1.42 while train_loss fell to 0.20. C18 uses freeze_conv_epochs=10 on TESS-only splits.

last_known.notes: Best candidate of 18: test AUC 0.8439, test raw F1 0.7979. freeze_conv_epochs=10 is clearly the right direction. T=1.61 worsened already-excellent test ECE (0.0301->0.0667) because val was overconfident; residual overfitting causes val/test calibration mismatch.

artifacts.validation_gate: Rejected: raw AUC 0.8439 < 0.85 gate, and temperature scaling worsened test Brier/ECE. C19 authorized with freeze_conv_epochs=20.
artifacts.next_action: Do not promote. C19 uses configs/cnn_tess_c19.json (freeze_conv_epochs=20) on same combined splits.

last_known.notes: LR scheduler fires on val_auc plateaus; during 20 frozen epochs val_auc improved monotonically (0.75->0.82), so LR never decayed. Conv unfroze at epoch 21 with LR still at 1e-4 — same as C18 at epoch 11. Longer frozen phase over-adapted FC head: T=1.88 vs T=1.61 in C18, producing worse calibration AND lower test AUC (0.8420 < C18's 0.8439). freeze_conv strategy is exhausted.

artifacts.validation_gate: Rejected: test AUC 0.8420 < 0.85 gate, regressed from C18; temperature scaling worsened test Brier/ECE. freeze_conv strategy exhausted.
artifacts.next_action: Do not promote or retry freeze_conv. Future model work must follow docs/exoplanet_exomoon_dataset_handoff.md rather than repeating this strategy.

last_known.scan: B5 first QLP discovery scan after stdout-safe Lightkurve fetch
last_known.selection: novel TESS targets after TOI/CTOI/confirmed-host exclusion
last_known.root_cause: The shared fetch path requested SPOC-style pdcsap_flux; valid QLP HLSP products provide KSPSAP_FLUX, DET_FLUX, SYS_RM_FLUX, or SAP_FLUX, not PDCSAP_FLUX. Lightkurve wrapped the missing-column KeyError as a misleading corrupt-download message.
last_known.fix_evidence: A live smoke after the fix read TIC 425884922 with flux_column=kspsap_flux+det_flux, sectors 1/2/28/68/95/96, n_cadences=38084, and baseline_days=2608.12.

last_known.observed_console: Selected 200 QLP targets with workers=4 and request_delay=0.5, then emitted many Astroquery/MAST Downloading URL lines and numerical warnings without scanner per-target progress in the captured output.
last_known.root_cause: ScanLog flushed only after record(), run_background_scan printed only after a future completed, and Lightkurve _download_one still called Astroquery Observations.download_products with verbose=True.
